Golden Retriever.care_tips: Needs regular exercise and grooming. Very social and loves to play fetch.

German Shepherd.care_tips: Requires mental and physical stimulation. Highly trainable and loyal.

Labrador Retriever.care_tips: Prone to obesity, needs portion control and plenty of swimming or running.

Bulldog.care_tips: Avoid extreme heat. Needs facial folds cleaned regularly to prevent infections.

Poodle.care_tips: Requires regular grooming to prevent matting. Very smart, needs engaging toys.

Siberian Husky.care_tips: High energy breed, needs rigorous exercise. They are escape artists, secure yard needed.

Pug.care_tips: Prone to breathing issues. Keep cool and avoid strenuous exercise in hot weather.

Beagle.care_tips: Follows their nose, always keep on a leash. Prone to ear infections.

Unknown.care_tips: Provide balanced diet, regular exercise, and lots of love.
